visa_types.name: Tourist
visa_types.documents_required:
- English - Application for Schengen Visa (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/79clLwG1jA5PuND8doqv0C/f2acdcb23faa1f24c6106e9b4743d0e9/Visa-Application-Form-English-Dec-2025.pdf) or Swedish - Application for Schengen Visa (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3KVeN2q7X8VgzltAr2N0zN/e82acdee1b03ff827d42b369b9e8bfd5/a0d5dbc0-d525-4105-a8e6-89092fc18dfa.pdf)  - to be completed, signed and dated. Please ensure that application forms for minors are signed by both parents. To help us process your application quickly and accurately, please complete the Sweden Visa Application Form (VAF) electronically using the editable PDF available on this site, print the typed copy and carry it with appointment letter during your visit to the visa application centre. Completing the form electronically reduces counter waiting time and helps avoid errors caused by illegible handwriting.
Note: Applicants who arrive without a form completed electronically will still be accepted with a completed handwritten form; however, they should expect additional processing time at Visa Application Centre.

- Please click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2f9ue4fdcg7RzbsEA39K6v/c19ee4daa51218b2c3679005bc2cc050/list-of-travel-medical-insurance-companies.pdf) to download the list of approved insurance companies in Thailand
Please prepare and arrange documents according to this Checklist (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1ip7RvEtJAM2mOwaktA9nP/da79d4b58f86e7eb88031dabf231612b/Tourism-Checklist-Oct-25.pdf) , also prepare an additional copy of your Passport ID page for Passport Collection (https://www.vfsvisaonline.com/Global-Passporttracking/Track/Index?q=shSA0YnE4pLF9Xzwon/x/A9+3ayKh2o6XUmXfdhngCZMkeebgThxlOcAz1iM6U0oUCviM/LAvFach2tJUkJCJw==).
Note:
- Applicant can be asked for additional documents or may be called for an interview if deemed necessary by the Embassy.
- The Visa fee, according to Schengen regulations, is non-refundable.
- Thai documentation shall be accompanied by a translation from an authorized translation bureau.
visa_types.visa_fees:
[Table: Tourist]
Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change. All the fees are non-refundable.
Please click here (https://www.migrationsverket.se/en/you-want-to-apply/visiting-sweden/visiting-sweden-for-up-to-90-days-entry-visa.html) for other exceptions to the visa fee
Service charge: 

[service charge thailand]
- There is a service charge levied per application above the visa fees.
- The Visa Application Centre offers an optional service at a nominal additional cost.
- The fees are non-refundable.
- Photocopying
- Photograph service
- Courier service
- SMS Service
- Please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/tha/en/swe/premium-services) for more information on the optional service.
- All charges (Visa Fee, VFS service charges and other charges) are to be paid in cash only in Thai Baht.
visa_types.processing_time:
The processing time will normally be about 15-45 days depending on the number of applications submitted (excluding day of submission and return to VFS). However, in some cases the procedure may take considerably longer.
Non-Thai citizen who wants to apply for Schengen visa, according to the Visa Codex article 6.1, please submit your visa application in the country where you are residing (usually your home country). If applicants still want to submit their applications in Bangkok, they should be aware that the applications might be rejected or dismissed and no refund of the application fee.
visa_types.forms:
Schengen Visa Application Form (English) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4c5RdEcpzR6EhO4ynC9V8O/e55895fb76f73b29b8eb58285414e06c/application-for-schengen-visa-english.pdf)
Schengen Visa Application Form (Swedish) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2yFgjjMdlqhahmtiogmfov/d841bb32d36d98a0288f3295212d32f7/application-for-schengen-visa-swedish.pdf)
visa_types.overview:
Overview
Tourist visa is granted for those where the intention is to visit Sweden for tourism and sightseeing without having an invitation from a Swedish reference.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Tourist visa is granted for those where the intention is to visit Sweden for tourism and sightseeing without having an invitation from a Swedish reference.

## Visa Fees

[Table: Tourist]
Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change. All the fees are non-refundable.
Please click here (https://www.migrationsverket.se/en/you-want-to-apply/visiting-sweden/visiting-sweden-for-up-to-90-days-entry-visa.html) for other exceptions to the visa fee
Service charge: 

[service charge thailand]
- There is a service charge levied per application above the visa fees.
- The Visa Application Centre offers an optional service at a nominal additional cost.
- The fees are non-refundable.
- Photocopying
- Photograph service
- Courier service
- SMS Service
- Please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/tha/en/swe/premium-services) for more information on the optional service.
- All charges (Visa Fee, VFS service charges and other charges) are to be paid in cash only in Thai Baht.

## Documents Required

- English - Application for Schengen Visa (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/79clLwG1jA5PuND8doqv0C/f2acdcb23faa1f24c6106e9b4743d0e9/Visa-Application-Form-English-Dec-2025.pdf) or Swedish - Application for Schengen Visa (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3KVeN2q7X8VgzltAr2N0zN/e82acdee1b03ff827d42b369b9e8bfd5/a0d5dbc0-d525-4105-a8e6-89092fc18dfa.pdf)  - to be completed, signed and dated. Please ensure that application forms for minors are signed by both parents. To help us process your application quickly and accurately, please complete the Sweden Visa Application Form (VAF) electronically using the editable PDF available on this site, print the typed copy and carry it with appointment letter during your visit to the visa application centre. Completing the form electronically reduces counter waiting time and helps avoid errors caused by illegible handwriting.
Note: Applicants who arrive without a form completed electronically will still be accepted with a completed handwritten form; however, they should expect additional processing time at Visa Application Centre.

- Please click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2f9ue4fdcg7RzbsEA39K6v/c19ee4daa51218b2c3679005bc2cc050/list-of-travel-medical-insurance-companies.pdf) to download the list of approved insurance companies in Thailand
Please prepare and arrange documents according to this Checklist (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1ip7RvEtJAM2mOwaktA9nP/da79d4b58f86e7eb88031dabf231612b/Tourism-Checklist-Oct-25.pdf) , also prepare an additional copy of your Passport ID page for Passport Collection (https://www.vfsvisaonline.com/Global-Passporttracking/Track/Index?q=shSA0YnE4pLF9Xzwon/x/A9+3ayKh2o6XUmXfdhngCZMkeebgThxlOcAz1iM6U0oUCviM/LAvFach2tJUkJCJw==).
Note:
- Applicant can be asked for additional documents or may be called for an interview if deemed necessary by the Embassy.
- The Visa fee, according to Schengen regulations, is non-refundable.
- Thai documentation shall be accompanied by a translation from an authorized translation bureau.

## Photo Specifications
 A Photograph submitted with the application form should comply with the following specifications:
- 1 Color photographs printed on normal photographic paper
- Passport sized 45mm x 35mm or 2 inches
- White background
- Taken not later than 6 months
- Close up of your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70 -80% of the photograph
- In sharp focus and clear of high quality with no ink marks or creases
- Should be without sunglasses, hat or cap
Remarks: The above photograph requirement also applies to minors from 0-11 years old.

## Processing Time
The processing time will normally be about 15-45 days depending on the number of applications submitted (excluding day of submission and return to VFS). However, in some cases the procedure may take considerably longer.
Non-Thai citizen who wants to apply for Schengen visa, according to the Visa Codex article 6.1, please submit your visa application in the country where you are residing (usually your home country). If applicants still want to submit their applications in Bangkok, they should be aware that the applications might be rejected or dismissed and no refund of the application fee.

## Download Forms
Schengen Visa Application Form (English) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4c5RdEcpzR6EhO4ynC9V8O/e55895fb76f73b29b8eb58285414e06c/application-for-schengen-visa-english.pdf)
Schengen Visa Application Form (Swedish) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2yFgjjMdlqhahmtiogmfov/d841bb32d36d98a0288f3295212d32f7/application-for-schengen-visa-swedish.pdf)

visa_types.name: Visa Types
visa_types.overview:
- Tourist
- Visit Family/Friends
- Business or Conference
Required documents for all visa types
Please note that the following essentials must be met by all applicants submitting their applications for visa.
Passport or other valid travel document should be valid at least three months beyond the planned departure from Sweden. Please note that The Embassy of Sweden in Bangkok does not accept additional
                                                            pages inserted into passports. Ensure Passport has at least two blank pages to which a visa can be affixed, if not a new passport must be obtained before submitting your application.
Relevant Forms & Photograph Fully completed application form appropriate to the type of visa and supplementary form requested with two original passport-size photographs [NB: digital photographs
                                                            not acceptable]
An authorized translation must be attached to any documents in Thai
Other Information:
Visa for Applicants under the age of 18
- In addition to the compulsory documentation required, the following documentation is required for applicants under the age of 18.
- The application form needs to be signed by a legal custodian
- Birth certificate for the applicant
- Consent from both parents to travel abroad. If the applicant is under custody of only one parent a certificate showing this is required. The documentation needs to be in original and issued by
                                                                the legal Thai authorities. The documentation also needs to be supported by the custodian's id-cards
Required Travel Insurance 
A medical insurance is compulsory for visitors to Sweden and other Schengen states. You may provide either a policy from an insurance company based in Europe or in Thailand. Please note that only
                                                            certain insurance companies in Thailand are accepted. The insurance must cover at least 30,000 Euro or 1,500,000 Baht and include costs for medical treatment, hospitalization and repatriation
                                                            due to injury or medical reasons. The insurance must be valid in all Schengen states and cover the total length of the visit. 
The reimbursement from the insurance company must be payable in any EU-country, Switzerland and Lichtenstein. The insurance certificate must be shown when the application is submitted. Please note
                                                            that you have to bring your travel insurance with you when travelling due to inspections of relevant documents at the border control when entering the Schengen area.
Please click  here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5rOz62bGMXpu7uySfJvESG/9143b7dfe702d2ff3768b463a3b5862d/list-of-travel-medical-insurance-companies.pdf) to download the list of approved insurance companies in Thailand

The reimbursement from the insurance company must be payable in any EU-country, Switzerland and Lichtenstein. The insurance certificate must be shown when the application is submitted. Please note

visa_types.overview:
Overview
This visa is provided for those who are visiting family and/-or friends. The inviting person has to fill out the invitation form number 241011
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This visa is provided for those who are visiting family and/-or friends. The inviting person has to fill out the invitation form number 241011

## Visa Fees

[Table: Visit Family/friends]
Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change. All the fees are non-refundable.
Please click here (https://www.migrationsverket.se/en/you-want-to-apply/visiting-sweden/visiting-sweden-for-up-to-90-days-entry-visa.html) for other exceptions to the visa fee

[service charge thailand]
- There is a service charge levied per application above the visa fees.
- The Visa Application Centre offers an optional service at a nominal additional cost.
- The fees are non-refundable.

- Photograph service

- Please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/tha/en/swe/premium-services) for more information on the optional service.
- All charges (Visa Fee, VFS service charges and other charges) are to be paid in cash only in Thai Baht.

## Documents Required
- English - Application for Schengen Visa (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3JQSvuZ08GnANM90uczaxJ/06b8ea23938e9b8e4be8a2b7e247fc40/Visa-Application-Form-English-Dec-2025__1_.pdf) or Swedish - Application for Schengen Visa (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/7Jh43vLUXuJDZyTXUP85Lt/ec5f7b9ae1dedf2c11f20bc9f3071a10/689db27f-11e9-4917-966b-b2f564b5ba91.pdf) - to be completed, signed and dated. Please ensure that application forms for minors are signed by both parents. To help us process your application quickly and accurately, please complete the Sweden Visa Application Form (VAF) electronically using the editable PDF available on this site, print the typed copy and carry it with appointment letter during your visit to the visa application centre. Completing the form electronically reduces counter waiting time and helps avoid errors caused by illegible handwriting.
Note: Applicants who arrive without a form completed electronically will still be accepted with a completed handwritten form; however, they should expect additional processing time at Visa Application Centre.

- Please click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5yr1MEXUcoSgl3RNieHgwd/8a226d124271617a8b015c1930153da7/list-of-travel-medical-insurance-companies__1_.pdf) to download the list of approved insurance companies in Thailand

- Invitation Form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3033z0AJ6nXrQl8eHLEaAn/e15ccadab94b3306f0c03ed5e063957c/invitation-form-for-schengen-visa.pdf)
Note:
- Applicant can be asked for additional documents or may be called for an interview if deemed necessary by the Embassy.
- The Visa fee, according to Schengen regulations, is non-refundable.
- Thai documentation shall be accompanied by a translation from an authorized translation bureau.

## Photo Specifications
 A Photograph submitted with the application form should comply with the following specifications:
- 1 Color photographs printed on normal photographic paper
- Passport sized 45mm x 35mm or 2 inches
- White background
- Taken not later than 6 months
- Close up of your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70 -80% of the photograph
- In sharp focus and clear of high quality with no ink marks or creases
- Should be without sunglasses, hat or cap
Remarks: The above photograph requirement also applies to minors from 0-11 years old.

## Processing Time
The processing time will normally be about 15-45 days depending on the number of applications submitted (excluding day of submission and return to VFS). However, in some cases the procedure may take considerably longer.
Non-Thai citizen who wants to apply for Schengen visa, according to the Visa Codex article 6.1, please submit your visa application in the country where you are residing (usually your home country). If applicants still want to submit their applications in Bangkok, they should be aware that the applications might be rejected or dismissed and no refund of the application fee.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
A business visa is granted for those who are visiting Sweden for business or conference meetings.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
A business visa is granted for those who are visiting Sweden for business or conference meetings.

## Visa Fees

[Table: Business Or Conference]
Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change. All the fees are non-refundable.
Please click here (https://www.migrationsverket.se/en/you-want-to-apply/visiting-sweden/visiting-sweden-for-up-to-90-days-entry-visa.html) for other exceptions to the visa fee

[service charge thailand]
- There is a service charge levied per application above the visa fees.
- The Visa Application Centre offers an optional service at a nominal additional cost.
- The fees are non-refundable.
- Photocopying
- Photograph service
- Courier service
- SMS Service
- Please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/tha/en/swe/premium-services) for more information on the optional service.
- All charges (Visa Fee, VFS service charges and other charges) are to be paid in cash only in Thai Baht.

## Documents Required

- English - Application for Schengen Visa (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/wU8g4lz4wkdPoNMxZRMsS/08ec533ddc183877630cedfe579b6297/Application_for_Schengen_Visa234.pdf) or Swedish - Application for Schengen Visa (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/waEoQXPmsDGdMWZicnWE4/ec096b85562b22a418921f86e3be8e09/Visa-Application-Form-Swedish-Dec-2025.pdf) - to be completed, signed and dated. Please ensure that application forms for minors are signed by both parents. To help us process your application quickly and accurately, please complete the Sweden Visa Application Form (VAF) electronically using the editable PDF available on this site, print the typed copy and carry it with appointment letter during your visit to the visa application centre. Completing the form electronically reduces counter waiting time and helps avoid errors caused by illegible handwriting.
Note: Applicants who arrive without a form completed electronically will still be accepted with a completed handwritten form; however, they should expect additional processing time at Visa Application Centre.
- Please click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/Dl1VDSrwZHTwYE68jyFoz/cf55e3845d9817a6e40865218c5be5fd/list-of-travel-medical-insurance-companies__2_.pdf) to download the list of approved insurance companies in Thailand
Please prepare and arrange documents according to this Checklist (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6DNpkzNQ4GeiACfPoSMRI8/0a4de4a2a67392d27e89ffa737d78100/Business-Checklist-Oct-2025.pdf), also prepare an additional copy of your Passport ID page for Passport Collection (https://www.vfsvisaonline.com/Global-Passporttracking/Track/Index?q=shSA0YnE4pLF9Xzwon/x/A9+3ayKh2o6XUmXfdhngCZMkeebgThxlOcAz1iM6U0oUCviM/LAvFach2tJUkJCJw==). 
Note: 
- Applicant can be asked for additional documents or may be called for an interview if deemed necessary by the Embassy.
- The Visa fee, according to Schengen regulations, is non-refundable.
- Thai documentation shall be accompanied by a translation from an authorized translation bureau.

## Photo Specifications
 A Photograph submitted with the application form should comply with the following specifications:
- 1 Color photographs printed on normal photographic paper
- Passport sized 45mm x 35mm or 2 inches
- White background
- Taken not later than 6 months
- Close up of your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70 -80% of the photograph
- In sharp focus and clear of high quality with no ink marks or creases
- Should be without sunglasses, hat or cap
Remarks: The above photograph requirement also applies to minors from 0-11 years old.

## Processing Time
The processing time will normally be about 15-45 days depending on the number of applications submitted (excluding day of submission and return to VFS). However, in some cases the procedure may take considerably longer.
Non-Thai citizen who wants to apply for Schengen visa, according to the Visa Codex article 6.1, please submit your visa application in the country where you are residing (usually your home country). If applicants still want to submit their applications in Bangkok, they should be aware that the applications might be rejected or dismissed and no refund of the application fee.

## Download Forms
Schengen Visa Application Form (English) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4c5RdEcpzR6EhO4ynC9V8O/e55895fb76f73b29b8eb58285414e06c/application-for-schengen-visa-english.pdf)
Schengen Visa Application Form (Swedish) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2yFgjjMdlqhahmtiogmfov/d841bb32d36d98a0288f3295212d32f7/application-for-schengen-visa-swedish.pdf)
To Download a Form:
- Click on the
 form 
link.
- When the form opens, save the form on
 your computer
.
OR
- Press the right button on
 your mouse 
on the required link.
- Select
 Save Target As 
from the list
- Save 
the form on your computer
